title: AGNI / Open Lesson Standard v1.8
description: A standard for offline, sensor-rich interactive lessons. Supports forking, adaptive reordering (θ), learner pacing metrics, fill-in-the-blank / matching / ordering assessments, and author-declared feature overrides. Metadata complies with Dublin Core (DC) and LRMI/Schema.org.

version.description: Semver version of the OLS spec.

locale.description: Cultural/regional adaptation target (e.g., 'KE', 'US', 'IN-TN'). Two lessons can share a language but differ in locale.

time_required.description: Expected total lesson duration in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g., 'PT12M' for 12 minutes).

difficulty.description: Difficulty rating from 1 (easiest) to 5 (hardest). Used by θ for adaptive ordering.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical lesson content (meta + steps, sorted keys). Computed on save; forms the basis of the immutability chain.

parent_hash.description: Content hash of the previous version of this lesson. Null for the first version. Forms a hash chain for immutability verification.

uri.description: Canonical lesson URI: agni:<creator_id>/<slug>. Auto-generated from creator ID and slug; not set by hand.

creator_id.description: ID of the creator account that authored this lesson. Set automatically on save.

utu.description: UTU label (3D coordinate): Spine, Band, Protocol. See docs/specs/utu-architecture.md.

class.description: Spine ID (e.g. MAC-2, SCI-1, SOC-3). Canonical: MAC-1..8, SCI-1..7, SOC-1..7.

spineId.description: Alias for class. Spine ID for the lesson target.

protocol.description: Pedagogical protocol P1-P5: 1=Transmission, 2=Guided Construction, 3=Apprenticeship, 4=Dev. Sequencing, 5=Meaning Activation.

is_group.description: Whether this lesson is designed for group/collaborative work. When true, teachers can assign it to student groups.

accessibility_mode.description: Primary accessibility mode this lesson targets. 'audio_first' enables auto-narration of all steps for blind or illiterate learners. The runtime honours this by enabling AGNI_NARRATION automatically.

declared_features.description: Author-declared pedagogical feature overrides. Values here take precedence over compiler-inferred features and receive confidence 1.0.

blooms_level.description: Bloom's Taxonomy level declared by the author.

vark.description: VARK modality or modalities declared by the author.

checkpointExpiryMs.description: Client-side checkpoint expiry in milliseconds. Overrides the default 7-day (604800000 ms) expiry.

source_identifier.description: Identifier of the original lesson this was forked from.

source_version.description: Version of the OLS spec the source lesson used.

source_hash.description: Content hash of the source lesson at time of fork.

fork_type.description: What kind of fork this is. 'translation' = same content, new language. 'adaptation' = same topic, different cultural context. 'remix' = structural changes. 'correction' = bug/error fix.

changes.description: Human-readable summary of what changed from the source.

passing_score.description: Minimum score (0.0–1.0) to pass this gate. Default: 1.0 (must answer correctly).

retry_delay.description: Minimum wait time before retrying this gate (ISO 8601 duration). Prevents brute-forcing.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this lesson. Used by θ for reordering and by forks for change tracking.

type.description: instruction: text/content; hardware_trigger: sensor gate; quiz: MCQ with answers; fill_blank: cloze with ___ placeholders; matching: pair left↔right items; ordering: arrange items in sequence; completion: lesson-complete screen.

feedback.description: Feedback text (string) or per-outcome feedback object with 'correct' and 'incorrect' messages.

blanks.description: For fill_blank steps: one entry per ___ placeholder in content. Each blank defines the correct answer and optional accepted alternatives.

accept.description: Additional accepted spellings/variants (case-insensitive match at runtime).

pairs.description: For matching steps: each pair links a left term to a right term. The player shuffles the right column.

items.description: For ordering steps: list of items to arrange. The player shuffles them; the student drags them into the correct sequence.

correct_order.description: For ordering steps: zero-based indices defining the correct arrangement of 'items'. E.g. [0,1,2] means items are already in correct order.

expected_duration.description: How long this step should take for an on-pace learner (ISO 8601 duration). θ compares actual vs. expected to detect struggling or excelling.

max_attempts.description: Maximum attempts for quiz, fill_blank, matching, or ordering steps before marking as failed. Default varies by type.

weight.description: Importance of this step to the lesson's learning objective (0.0–1.0). A core concept quiz might be 0.9; a calibration step might be 0.2.

on_fail.description: Action when max_attempts is exhausted. Can be a redirect (e.g., 'redirect:step_id'), a hint, or 'skip'.

on_success.description: Action on successful completion. Can skip ahead (e.g., 'skip_to:step_id') for excelling learners.

audio_description.description: Author-provided narration text for this step. When present, the audio-first mode speaks this instead of extracting text from HTML content. Essential for SVG-heavy or visual steps where the rendered text alone is insufficient for blind or illiterate learners.

condition.description: Conditional expression for whether this step should be shown. Used for adaptive paths.

next_if.description: Conditional next step override. Format: 'condition -> step_id'.

svg_spec.description: SVGFactory visual specification. Rendered by the player via svg-registry.js. Can be a single factory (factory + opts) or a compose layer (compose: true + layers[]).

factory.description: Registered factory name: venn, barGraph, pieChart, numberLine, balanceScale, clockFace, flowMap, polygon, axis, tree, numberLineDynamic, clockFaceDynamic, timeGraph, arrowMap, gauge, polygonDynamic, cartesianGrid, unitCircle.

opts.description: Factory-specific options. See svg-registry.js for valid keys per factory.

description.description: Alt-text description of this visual for screen readers and auto-narration mode. Spoken aloud when the SVG is rendered.

compose.description: If true, layers[] is used instead of factory/opts.

layers.description: Array of factory layers when compose is true.

w.description: Viewport width override (shared across layers in compose mode).
